TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami_Iyong, title = Iyong, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Amis]}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/wiki/Iyong} }

S.FORM: == Iyong == O iyong hanany i, o misanga'an no Ripon yo mikowanho to Taiwan i 1895-1945 a mihcan. O tatapongan no Ripon a misanga' to iyong i, o sapalacidek to i lotokay ato i ^naray ko 'orip a Yin-cumin. O halikani ato tartar no kilang ko sapi'alat a mi'adipel, onini i o celay no iyong han. O misakoliay a mikacaw to nini a celay no iyong a tamdaw i o mala iyongay han no mato'asay. Yo tahini i Kalinko ko pikowan no Ripon i,mapod ko Taloko i niyaro' no Pangcah a militafad, saka liyoken no Ripon to halikani^ ko sinara'ed no Pangcah ato Taloko. o Cikasoan a tamdaw ko mamikacaw to nian a miliyokan to halikani^, tona caay kahacowa ko sapalifun to mikacaway a tamdaw, saka cihian no Cikasoan a tamdaw ko ci todongay a Ripon, o nian a demakan ko nipifulaw no Ripon to Cikasoan a tamdaw i 1908 a mihcaan.
S.PHON: == ijo~uŋ == o~u ijo~uŋ ħananj i, o~u misaŋaʡan no~u ripo~un jo~u miko~uwanħo~u to~u taiwan i ****-**** a miħʦan. o~u tatapo~uŋan no~u ripo~un a misaŋaʡ to~u ijo~uŋ i, o~u sapaɾaʦiɬ~ɮək to~u i ɾo~uto~ukaj ato~u i ʔnaraj ko~u ʡo~urip a jin-ʦo~u~umin. o~u ħaɾikani ato~u tartar no~u kiɾaŋ ko~u sapiʡaɾat a miʡaɬ~ɮipəɾ, o~unini i o~u ʦəɾaj no~u ijo~uŋ ħan. o~u misako~uɾiaj a mikaʦaw to~u nini a ʦəɾaj no~u ijo~uŋ a tamɬ~ɮaw i o~u maɾa ijo~uŋaj ħan no~u mato~uʡasaj. jo~u taħini i kaɾinko~u ko~u piko~uwan no~u ripo~un i,mapo~uɬ~ɮ ko~u taɾo~uko~u i nijaro~uʡ no~u paŋʦaħ a miɾitafaɬ~ɮ, saka ɾijo~ukən no~u ripo~un to~u ħaɾikaniʔ ko~u sinaraʡəɬ~ɮ no~u paŋʦaħ ato~u taɾo~uko~u. o~u ʦikaso~uan a tamɬ~ɮaw ko~u mamikaʦaw to~u nian a miɾijo~ukan to~u ħaɾikaniʔ, to~una ʦaaj kaħaʦo~uwa ko~u sapaɾifo~u~un to~u mikaʦawaj a tamɬ~ɮaw, saka ʦiħian no~u ʦikaso~uan a tamɬ~ɮaw ko~u ʦi to~uɬ~ɮo~uŋaj a ripo~un, o~u nian a ɬ~ɮəmakan ko~u nipifo~u~uɾaw no~u ripo~un to~u ʦikaso~uan a tamɬ~ɮaw i **** a miħʦaan.
S.FORM: == Iyong == O iyong hanany i, o misanga'an no Ripon yo mikowanho to Taiwan i 1895-1945 a mihcan. O tatapongan no Ripon a misanga' to iyong i, o sapalacidek to i lotokay ato i ^naray ko 'orip a Yin-cumin. O halikani ato tartar no kilang ko sapi'alat a mi'adipel, onini i o celay no iyong han. O misakoliay a mikacaw to nini a celay no iyong a tamdaw i o mala iyongay han no mato'asay. Yo tahini i Kalinko ko pikowan no Ripon i,mapod ko Taloko i niyaro' no Pangcah a militafad, saka liyoken no Ripon to halikani^ ko sinara'ed no Pangcah ato Taloko. o Cikasoan a tamdaw ko mamikacaw to nian a miliyokan to halikani^, tona caay kahacowa ko sapalifun to mikacaway a tamdaw, saka cihian no Cikasoan a tamdaw ko ci todongay a Ripon, o nian a demakan ko nipifulaw no Ripon to Cikasoan a tamdaw i 1908 a mihcaan.
S.PHON: == ijo~uŋ == o~u ijo~uŋ ħananj i, o~u misaŋaʡan no~u ripo~un jo~u miko~uwanħo~u to~u taiwan i ****-**** a miħʦan. o~u tatapo~uŋan no~u ripo~un a misaŋaʡ to~u ijo~uŋ i, o~u sapaɾaʦiɬ~ɮək to~u i ɾo~uto~ukaj ato~u i ʔnaraj ko~u ʡo~urip a jin-ʦo~u~umin. o~u ħaɾikani ato~u tartar no~u kiɾaŋ ko~u sapiʡaɾat a miʡaɬ~ɮipəɾ, o~unini i o~u ʦəɾaj no~u ijo~uŋ ħan. o~u misako~uɾiaj a mikaʦaw to~u nini a ʦəɾaj no~u ijo~uŋ a tamɬ~ɮaw i o~u maɾa ijo~uŋaj ħan no~u mato~uʡasaj. jo~u taħini i kaɾinko~u ko~u piko~uwan no~u ripo~un i,mapo~uɬ~ɮ ko~u taɾo~uko~u i nijaro~uʡ no~u paŋʦaħ a miɾitafaɬ~ɮ, saka ɾijo~ukən no~u ripo~un to~u ħaɾikaniʔ ko~u sinaraʡəɬ~ɮ no~u paŋʦaħ ato~u taɾo~uko~u. o~u ʦikaso~uan a tamɬ~ɮaw ko~u mamikaʦaw to~u nian a miɾijo~ukan to~u ħaɾikaniʔ, to~una ʦaaj kaħaʦo~uwa ko~u sapaɾifo~u~un to~u mikaʦawaj a tamɬ~ɮaw, saka ʦiħian no~u ʦikaso~uan a tamɬ~ɮaw ko~u ʦi to~uɬ~ɮo~uŋaj a ripo~un, o~u nian a ɬ~ɮəmakan ko~u nipifo~u~uɾaw no~u ripo~un to~u ʦikaso~uan a tamɬ~ɮaw i **** a miħʦaan.
